articles.title: Ex-Stoughton cop Matthew Farwell’s DNA was on strap used to strangle Sandra Birchmore, prosecutors say
articles.description:
Believing that she was pregnant with his child, Farwell killed the 23-year-old Birchmore in 2021, according to prosecutors.

The post Ex-Stoughton cop Matthew Farwell’s DNA was on strap used to strangle Sandra Birchmore, prosecutors say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Prosecutors allege ex-cop Matthew Farwell killed Sandra Birchmore in 2021 over a pregnancy dispute.
DNA evidence links Farwell to the crime scene via the strap used to strangle Birchmore.
The case raises concerns about police accountability and public safety in Stoughton and Boston.

articles.title: A young mother rescued her 2-year-old son after their car crashed into a Vermont river
articles.description:
"The child was in a car seat in the back seat; the mother was able to unbuckle him, cut through the deployed driver's-side airbag, and emerge through the window."

The post A young mother rescued her 2-year-old son after their car crashed into a Vermont river appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A mother rescued her 2-year-old son from a submerged car in Vermont.
She unbuckled him from his car seat and cut through the airbag.
This incident highlights the dangers of driving in adverse conditions for Boston families.

articles.title: All the places you can go on the Amtrak Downeaster
articles.description:
Your next New England adventure is only a train ride away.

The post All the places you can go on the Amtrak Downeaster appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore New England destinations via Amtrak Downeaster from Boston to Brunswick, Maine.
The train operates daily, connecting Boston to five key stops along the route.
Residents benefit from convenient travel options for weekend trips and regional tourism.
